ATTY. GAIL E. LEES OF GIBSON DUNN, TEL. NO. (213) 229-7163 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS DAVID COLE AND JAUNA COLE'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement IS GRANTED. CLASS COUNSEL ARE AWARDED $282,627 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND REIMBURSEMENT OF EXPENSES IN THE AMOUNT OF $17,373.00 TO BE ALLOCATED IN THE DISCRETION OF CLASS COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement;
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Continued To Apr-27-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEONARD W. ARAGON OF THE HAGENS BERMAN LLP, TEL. NO. (602) 840-5900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. GAIL E. LEES OF THE GIBSON DUNN & CRUTCHER LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 229-7163 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WELLGS FARGO BANK.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS DAVID COLE and JAUNA COLE'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is continued to APRIL 27, 2011 for hearing to allow Plaintiff's counsel to submit more evidence regarding fees. The court approved the amount of $180,000.00 in today's hearing to be the fair amount in light of the payout and evidence before the court concerning loadstar. FURTHER SUBMISSION TO BE FILED BY APRIL 18, 2011. THE COURT APPROVED THE JUDGMENT PENDING THE DETERMINATION OF THE ATTORNEY'S FEE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
